Taxonomy_y: Eukaryota; Viridiplantae; Streptophyta; Embryophyta; Bryophyta; Andreaeophytina; Andreaeopsida; Andreaeales; Andreaeaceae; Andreaea
Assembly: The assembly caAndMuta2.1 is based on 32x PacBio data and Arima2 Hi-C data generated by the Darwin Tree of Life Project~(https://www.darwintreeoflife.org/). The assembly process included the following sequence of steps: initial PacBio assembly generation with Hifiasm, and Hi-C based scaffolding with YaHS. The mitochondrial and chloroplast genomes were assembled using OATK. Finally, the primary assembly was analysed and manually improved using TreeVal. Chromosome-scale scaffolds confirmed by the Hi-C data have been named in order of size.
